caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white collared shirt, a black vest with blue embroidery, and a red necklace, stands before a microphone and performs. He is positioned in front of a backdrop of brown horizontal blinds. He holds a yellow guitar, though only the top portion is visible. In the foreground, the backs of several people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. To the right of the performer, the text "ORCA" appears on the screen in white uppercase letters. Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in the same position, singing into the microphone with his mouth open, while the audience members in the foreground remain relatively still. The scene is consistent throughout the clip, capturing a focused moment of a musical performance.
